title: bomboaddons
description: BomboAddons is a comprehensive utility mod for Hypixel SkyBlock on Fabric. It provides a wide range of essential Quality of Life (QoL) overlays, solvers, and advanced mechanics to help players optimize their efficiency in the Garden, Dungeons, and beyond.
body:
BomboAddons is a comprehensive utility mod for Hypixel SkyBlock on Fabric. It provides a wide range of essential Quality of Life (QoL) overlays, solvers, and advanced mechanics to help players optimize their efficiency in the Garden, Dungeons, and beyond.

# Features
- Sign Calculator
- Garden Keybinds
- SBE Commands
- Carnival Helper
- Lowest BIN/bz on tooltip
- NPC Sell price on tooltip
- Inore caps on chat commands
- Hotkeys for various things
- Mob Highlighter
- Wardrobe Keybinds
- Etherwarp Helper
- Sphinx correct answer
- Hollow Wand fix
- Experiments solver
- Hotbar profiles
- custom command profiles
  


## How to Use
Once you have installed BomboAddons into your Fabric mods folder, you can start using it immediately.

Accessing Settings: Use the in-game command /bombo (or /b) to open the configuration menu and toggle features on or off.

Tooltips: Bazaar and NPC price tooltips are active by default. Simply hover over any item in your inventory or the Auction House to see the live data.

Sign Calculator: While typing on a sign, use common math symbols (like +, -, *) and the mod will automatically provide the result.
